title: Mod Menu (NeoForge Edition)
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- Port of Mod Menu for NeoForge keeping true to the name, easier to search for. ![modmenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306736ac812ba933beb66a44711642926787cb52.png) Additional Features: Comes with auto-detection of a mods config files if the mod dev didn't explicitly add mod menu support, and provides a button to access their configs in a neoforge menu. Thanks to the original authors of mod menu and thanks to 1foxy2 for the original port. Link to the original mod menu: https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
